# QualityNeighbor - Hartland Ranch Community Newsletter

## About

QualityNeighbor is the monthly digital newsletter for Hartland Ranch, a residential neighborhood in Lockhart, Texas. The site serves as a community hub where neighbors can share needs, discover local events, read neighborhood stories, find gardening tips, support local businesses, and celebrate community wins.

## Site Structure

### Main Sections

1. **Hero/Masthead** - Brand introduction with newsletter subscription CTA
2. **This Month at a Glance** - Featured story preview with quick navigation links
3. **Neighborly Needs Board** - Community help requests, offers, and lost & found
4. **Upcoming Events** - Local events with countdown timer
5. **Monthly Poll** - Interactive community voting
6. **Neighborhood Story** - Long-form editorial content
7. **Garden & Home Tip** - Seasonal practical advice
8. **Local Business Ads** - Free advertising for neighbor-owned businesses
9. **Neighbor Spotlight** - Resident profiles and interviews
10. **Fulfilled Needs & Shoutouts** - Community celebrations
11. **Resources & FAQ** - Quick links and frequently asked questions
12. **Contact/Subscribe** - Newsletter signup and footer

## Technical Details

- **Framework**: React + TypeScript + Vite
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom warm editorial color palette
- **Animations**: GSAP + ScrollTrigger for scroll-driven animations
- **State Management**: React hooks with localStorage persistence
- **Icons**: Lucide React
- **Components**: shadcn/ui (Accordion, Sheet, Button, Card, etc.)

## Color Palette

- **Paper Primary**: #F4F1EA (warm cream background)
- **Paper Secondary**: #E9E2D7 (deeper paper tone)
- **Vintage Red**: #C31F2B (accent color for CTAs)
- **Espresso**: #2B1F16 (primary text)
- **Warm Brown**: #6E5C4B (secondary text)
- **Cream**: #FDFCF9 (card backgrounds)

## Typography

- **Headings**: Fraunces (serif display font)
- **Body**: Inter (sans-serif)
- **Labels/Mono**: Space Mono (for dates, metadata)

## Interactive Features

- Filterable needs board (Help/Offer/Find categories)
- Live countdown timer for next event
- Poll voting with localStorage persistence
- "Save for later" on garden tips
- "Mark as helpful" on needs
- Newsletter subscription with confirmation
- Floating quick-action button
- Mobile-responsive navigation

## Data Persistence

The following features use localStorage:
- Poll votes and selections
- "Saved" garden tips
- "Helpful" marks on needs
- Newsletter subscription status
- Dark mode preference (if implemented)

## External Dependencies

- Google Fonts (Fraunces, Inter, Space Mono)
- No external APIs required
- No backend required

## Deployment

Optimized for static hosting on GitHub Pages, Vercel, Netlify, or similar platforms.

## Accessibility

- Semantic HTML structure
- ARIA labels on interactive elements
- Keyboard navigation support
- Focus indicators
- Reduced motion support via prefers-reduced-motion

## Contact

Built for Hartland Ranch • Lockhart, TX
